zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Clayton II於大約1081年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 波斯時，他的父親Baron William de Clayton I22歲，母親Mary Hyde22歲。他於大約1110年與Lady Margaret Cabaldeston在英國藍卡爾利布斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1089年住在英國英格蘭藍卡爾。他去世於1146年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾利藍德享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clayton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places, in Yorkshire, Lancashire, Staffordshire, and Sussex, named Clayton, from Old English clǣg ‘clay’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cleeton
meanings: English (Shropshire and Worcestershire): variant of   Clayton  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Clayton II was born about 1081, in Clayton le Moors, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Baron William de Clayton I, was 22 and his mother, Mary Hyde, was 22. He married Lady Margaret Cabaldeston about 1110, in Ribchester, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom in 1089. He died in 1146, in Leyland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Clayton II(이)가 대략 1081년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 클레이턴 일 무르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baron William de Clayton I(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Hyde(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1110년 영국 랭카실르 리브체스터에서 Lady Margaret Cabaldeston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1089년도에 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 살았다. 그는 1146년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 리랜드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Cabaldeston aproximadamente 1110, em Ribchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1089. Ele faleceu em 1146, em Leyland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Clayton II родился около 1081 г. в местности клеитон л мурс, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Baron William de Clayton I было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Hyde, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Cabaldeston около 1110 г. в местности рибчестир, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в 1089 году. Он умер в 1146 г. в местности лиланд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Clayton II nació aproximadamente 1081, en Clayton le Moors, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Baron William de Clayton I, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mary Hyde, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Cabaldeston aproximadamente 1110, en Ribchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1089. Murió en 1146, en Leyland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años.
